## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (zero warnings)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm knip` passes (no dead code / unused deps introduced)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Relevant docs updated in the same PR (`docs/**`, `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] All times handled in UTC (no local timezone leaks)
- [ ] If touching a versioned Thing: version timeline + lock semantics still hold
- [ ] If adding an integration: it lives in the catalog and extends the right base interface
- [ ] If adding an AI agent: agent folder + system prompt + README
